untranslatable_reason: BARR pattern requires multi-step trend line analysis (lead-in trend line, warning line parallel construction, sell line construction, bump height measurement from highest high to trend line). These geometric constructions and the specific 'bump phase' identification with warning/sell lines cannot be expressed using only the available indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Returns, Bar Properties). The pattern fundamentally requires trend line drawing and parallel line offset calculations not supported by the indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using high volume confirmation (hvol_20) during uptrend (close > sma_20) for entry setup, and exit when price falls below trend proxy (sma_20). However, this does NOT capture the true BARR pattern mechanics: the lead-in uptrend phase, the bump phase with measured height thresholds, warning line construction at specific intervals above lead-in trend, sell line at intervals above warning line, or the rounding/reversal trigger. A proper implementation requires a custom trend line and parallel line offset indicator.
